description: Add cloud drive integration to Cosimo — cloud file browsing/attach in the File Panel, and Cloud Storage admin settings modal. Supports SharePoint and Google Drive with unified UX across providers.

userStories.title: Cloud storage TypeScript types
userStories.description: Add a new 'CLOUD STORAGE' section to /app/services/types.ts with all interfaces needed for the cloud drive feature. Read the existing file first to match comment style (/** JSDoc */ on each interface, // ==== section headers). Add interfaces: CloudProvider, SharePointSite, SharePointLibrary, GoogleDriveConfig, GoogleSharedFolder, CloudStorageSettings, CloudFile, CloudSource, DataScopeToggle. See CLOUD-DRIVE-BUILD-REFERENCE.md Prompt 1 for exact field definitions.
acceptanceCriteria: New 'CLOUD STORAGE' section exists at bottom of /app/services/types.ts
All 9 interfaces are defined with full JSDoc comments
Section header style matches existing sections (// ==== blocks)
npx tsc --noEmit passes with zero errors
userStories.notes: All 9 interfaces added with JSDoc and section headers matching existing style. Typecheck clean.

userStories.title: Cloud storage mock data
userStories.description: Create /app/data/mock-cloud-storage.ts with mock data for cloud providers, SharePoint sites, Google Drive config, cloud sources tree, cloud files, recent files, and data scope toggles. Read /app/data/mock-panels.ts and /app/data/mock-threads.ts first to match conventions (MOCK_* naming, typed imports from ~/services/types, ALLCAPS exports, // ==== section headers). See CLOUD-DRIVE-BUILD-REFERENCE.md Prompt 2 for exact data values.
acceptanceCriteria: New file /app/data/mock-cloud-storage.ts exists
Exports: MOCK_CLOUD_PROVIDERS, MOCK_SHAREPOINT_SITES, MOCK_GOOGLE_DRIVE_CONFIG, MOCK_CLOUD_STORAGE_SETTINGS, MOCK_CLOUD_SOURCES, MOCK_CLOUD_FILES, MOCK_RECENT_CLOUD_FILES, MOCK_DATA_SCOPE_TOGGLES
All imports reference ~/services/types
File follows the same comment/section pattern as mock-panels.ts
npx tsc --noEmit passes with zero errors
userStories.notes: All 8 exports created with typed imports and section headers matching mock-panels.ts conventions. Typecheck clean.

userStories.title: Cloud storage service layer
userStories.description: Create /app/services/cloud-storage.ts with async functions wrapping the mock data. Read /app/services/panels.ts and /app/services/threads.ts first to match the service layer pattern. Export: getCloudStorageSettings(), getCloudSources(), getCloudFiles(sourceId), getRecentCloudFiles(), getDataScopeToggles(), searchCloudFiles(query). See CLOUD-DRIVE-BUILD-REFERENCE.md Prompt 3 for exact function signatures.
acceptanceCriteria: New file /app/services/cloud-storage.ts exists
All 6 async functions exported with correct return types
Functions import from ~/data/mock-cloud-storage
JSDoc comments on each function match existing service file style
searchCloudFiles filters across all MOCK_CLOUD_FILES entries by name match

userStories.title: Expand chat store for cloud drive state
userStories.description: Add cloud drive state to the existing Zustand store in /app/stores/chat-store.ts. Read the file first. ONLY ADD — do not refactor or rename existing code. Expand FilePanelTab type to include 'cloud'. Add fields: cloudDriveMode, selectedCloudFiles, cloudActiveSourceId, cloudBreadcrumb, cloudSearchQuery, cloudSearchActive. Add actions: openCloudDrive, setCloudActiveSource, setCloudBreadcrumb, toggleCloudFileSelection, clearCloudSelection, setCloudSearchQuery, setCloudSearchActive. See CLOUD-DRIVE-BUILD-REFERENCE.md Prompt 4 for exact types and behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: FilePanelTab type now includes 'cloud'
All 6 new state fields added to ChatState interface with defaults
All 7 new actions added to ChatState interface and implemented in create()
No existing fields, actions, or default values modified
openCloudDrive sets filePanelOpen:true, filePanelTab:'cloud', workflowPanelOpen:false
toggleCloudFileSelection adds/removes from the array correctly
npx tsc --noEmit passes with zero errors

userStories.title: Cloud source tree component
userStories.description: Create /app/components/chat/cloud-source-tree.tsx — the left rail provider/source navigation. Read /app/components/chat/file-panel.tsx (especially FolderView) for styling patterns. Component receives sources (CloudSource[]), activeSourceId, onSelectSource. Grouped by provider with uppercase headers and colored left borders. Active source highlighted. See CLOUD-DRIVE-BUILD-REFERENCE.md Prompt 5 for exact styling.

Provider headers: SHAREPOINT / GOOGLE in mono uppercase with left accent border
Source items are buttons with proper hover/active/focus-visible states
Nested children (libraries under sites) indented
Active source uses berry/violet highlight colors
All classes use cn() for merging, dark mode variants present

userStories.title: Cloud file list component
userStories.description: Create /app/components/chat/cloud-file-list.tsx — the main file/folder listing area. Read /app/components/chat/file-panel.tsx (FolderView) and /app/components/chat/workflow-panel.tsx (file manifest rows) for styling patterns. Component shows files with type icons, name, metadata, and optional checkboxes in attach mode. Folders show chevron and item count. Loading state uses Skeleton from ~/components/ui/skeleton. See CLOUD-DRIVE-BUILD-REFERENCE.md Prompt 6 for exact specs.

Checkbox checked state: bg-violet-3 with white checkmark
Loading state shows 4 Skeleton rows

Row styling matches existing FolderView beveled border pattern

userStories.title: Cloud navigation bar component
userStories.description: Create /app/components/chat/cloud-nav-bar.tsx — breadcrumb navigation + search input above the file list. Read /app/components/ui/search-filter-bar.tsx and /app/components/ui/input.tsx for search/input patterns. Breadcrumb with clickable segments, provider as first crumb, last segment bold and non-clickable. Compact search input with Search icon and X clear button. See CLOUD-DRIVE-BUILD-REFERENCE.md Prompt 7 for exact specs.

userStories.title: Cloud selection bar component
userStories.description: Create /app/components/chat/cloud-selection-bar.tsx — the bottom action bar for attach mode. Read /app/components/chat/chat-input.tsx (staged files strip, lines 222-244) for the file selection display pattern. Shows 'N files selected (total size)' on left, Clear + Attach Files buttons on right. Attach button uses retro 3D raised beveled style with violet colors, disabled when no selection. See CLOUD-DRIVE-BUILD-REFERENCE.md Prompt 8 for exact specs.

userStories.title: Assemble cloud drive tab in FilePanel
userStories.description: Modify /app/components/chat/file-panel.tsx to add the Cloud Drive tab. Read the ENTIRE file first. Add a third tab button 'Cloud' using the EXACT same className as existing tabs. Import and wire CloudSourceTree, CloudFileList, CloudNavBar, CloudSelectionBar. Add cloud state selectors from useChatStore. Add useState for cloudSources, cloudFiles, cloudLoading. Add useEffects to load sources on mount and files when source/search changes. Create local CloudDriveContent sub-component (matching SpreadsheetView/FolderView pattern). Layout: left rail (140px source tree) + right area (nav bar + file list + optional selection bar). Set initialWidth to 560. See CLOUD-DRIVE-BUILD-REFERENCE.md Prompt 9 for the full wiring spec.
acceptanceCriteria: Third tab 'Cloud' appears in the FilePanel header tabs
Tab button className matches existing two tab buttons exactly
CloudDriveContent renders when activeTab === 'cloud'
Layout: 140px left source tree rail + flexible right content area
Source tree loads via getCloudSources() on mount
File list loads via getCloudFiles() when cloudActiveSourceId changes
Recent files shown when no source selected (getRecentCloudFiles)
Search triggers searchCloudFiles when cloudSearchActive
SelectionBar appears only when cloudDriveMode === 'attach'
File click in browse mode navigates folders or switches to spreadsheet tab for preview
File click in attach mode toggles selection
Panel initialWidth updated to 560
No existing SpreadsheetView or FolderView code modified
npx tsc --noEmit passes with zero errors

userStories.title: Wire attach button to cloud drive tab
userStories.description: Connect the 'From cloud drive' attach menu to the file panel. Read /app/routes/_app.chat.tsx and /app/components/chat/chat-input.tsx. In _app.chat.tsx: import useChatStore, get openCloudDrive, create handleAttach that calls openCloudDrive('attach') for 'drive' type and console.log for 'computer' type. Pass handleAttach as onAttach to ChatInput. See CLOUD-DRIVE-BUILD-REFERENCE.md Prompt 10.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'From cloud drive' in attach menu opens the file panel on Cloud tab
Cloud tab opens in attach mode (checkboxes visible, selection bar at bottom)
Clicking 'From computer' logs to console (placeholder for native picker)
useChatStore.openCloudDrive called with 'attach' argument
No changes to chat-input.tsx or attach-button.tsx needed
npx tsc --noEmit passes with zero errors

userStories.title: Cloud storage settings modal shell and provider cards
userStories.description: Create /app/components/settings/cloud-storage-settings.tsx — admin settings dialog for managing cloud drive connections. Read /app/components/ui/dialog.tsx, /app/components/ui/switch.tsx, /app/components/ui/tabs.tsx for component patterns. Use Dialog from ~/components/ui/dialog. DialogTitle 'Cloud Storage' with ADMIN badge. Provider cards for SharePoint and Google Drive with Connected badge, expand/collapse, site/library toggles (Switch component), shared folder list. '+ Connect a service' link at bottom. See CLOUD-DRIVE-BUILD-REFERENCE.md Prompt 11 for full specs. NOTE: you have approval to create the /app/components/settings/ directory.

'+ Connect a service' link at bottom of dialog
All toggle state is local (useState)
Dialog max-width ~520px
Dark mode variants on all elements

userStories.title: Data scope toggles for email and calendar
userStories.description: Add email and calendar placeholder toggles inside each provider card in the settings modal. Read /app/components/settings/cloud-storage-settings.tsx. Add a 'DATA SCOPES' section inside each ProviderCard's expanded area, below files and above Disconnect. Microsoft: Outlook Mail (Mail icon), Outlook Calendar (Calendar icon), SharePoint Files ('Managed above'). Google: Gmail (Mail icon), Google Calendar (Calendar icon), Drive Files ('Managed above'). See CLOUD-DRIVE-BUILD-REFERENCE.md Prompt 13.
acceptanceCriteria: DATA SCOPES section visible in both SharePoint and Google Drive expanded cards
Section separated by a thin border-t divider

Google shows: Gmail toggle, Google Calendar toggle, Drive Files 'Managed above' text
Each row has a Lucide icon (Mail, Calendar) + label + Switch toggle
'Managed above' items show italic text instead of a toggle
All toggles use local state (useState)

userStories.title: Dark mode and accessibility polish pass
userStories.description: Read ALL files created or modified in this feature (listed in acceptance criteria). For each file verify: (1) every bg-*, text-*, border-* class has a dark: variant, (2) every interactive element has focus-visible states, (3) all icon-only buttons have aria-label, (4) no inline styles (style={}), (5) no raw hex/rgb colors, (6) all conditional classes use cn(), (7) no @ts-ignore or any types. Fix anything found. Keep diffs minimal.
